sentences.arabic: الحُصُولُ عَلَى قِسْطٍ كَافٍ مِنَ النَّوْمِ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ ثَمَانِي سَاعَاتٍ عَلَى الأَقَلِّ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju spavanje najmanje osam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for at least eight hours every night.

sentences.arabic: قِلَّةُ النَّوْمِ تَجْعَلُ الإِنْسَانَ يَشْعُرُ بِالتَّعَبِ وَيَفْقِدُ التَّرْكِيزَ.
sentences.translation: Nedostatak sna čini da se čovjek osjeća umorno i gubi koncentraciju.
sentences.translationEn: Lack of sleep makes a person feel tired and lose focus.
